title: Blockchain Semester-End Examination Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the steps a student takes to complete a blockchain-secured semester-end exam, demonstrating the technology's application in academic credentialing.
relationships: Student interacts with Exam Platform to take the exam
Exam Platform calls Smart Contract to record hash of exam submission
Smart Contract execution is validated by University Node
Validated transaction is added to a new block on the Immutable Ledger
Successful transaction mints a Permanent Record credential for the student
